'''Green''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] under [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]].

==Biography==
[[File:GreenDeath-SOTETC.jpg|thumb|left|Green's death]]
The [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Prince/Legends|prince]] selected Green as a Vigo primarily because of the Human's network of spies. Green's ambitions to replace the [[Underlord]] were well known to Xizor, but he was not considered a credible threat. Many of Green's operatives were double agents with affiliations to [[Durga Besadii Tai|Durga]] the Hutt. Few of Green's rackets were sufficiently profitable in Xizor's eyes.

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], an ex-employee of Vigo Green retired on the planet [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] where he bought a patch of land to raise large creatures. As this employee still owed money to Green and failed to comply with certain payment arrangements, the Vigo recruited a group of discreet gunmen to teach him a lesson. The [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] thus traveled to the property and slayed any creatures they could find.<ref name="SWG:EIoaP">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Extract Interest on a Payment}} on Corellia</ref>

Eventually, Xizor discovered that Green was spying on Black Sun for an unknown outside organization. As a result, Xizor had [[Guri]] [[Death/Legends|kill]] Green in front of the other Vigos as a message. His position was subsequently given to another [[Human/Legends|Human]] who, unbeknownst to the council, was actually Xizor's niece [[Savan]] in disguise.

==Characteristics==
Green was middle-aged during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and his hair was receding. Green's lavish dress reflected his belief that such costumes gained him the respect of his underlings.
